% Auto-generated external baseline comparison table
\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\caption{Cross-lingual retrieval comparison: Kizana vs.\ external baselines. Statistical significance determined by paired $t$-test on per-query AP scores.}
\label{tab:external-baseline}
\begin{tabular}{lcccccc}
\toprule
System & MAP & MRR & NDCG@5 & NDCG@10 & P@5 & P@10 \\
\midrule
No Translation & 0.139 & 0.140 & 0.123 & 0.127 & 0.110 & 0.096 \\
Google Translate + BM25 & 0.799 & 0.876 & 0.580 & 0.649 & 0.750 & 0.733 \\
Google Translate + Scoring & 0.795 & 0.875 & 0.570 & 0.628 & 0.744 & 0.717 \\
\textbf{Kizana (Full)} & \textbf{0.740} & \textbf{0.749} & \textbf{0.465} & \textbf{0.541} & \textbf{0.704} & \textbf{0.692} \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}
